run_groups.geometry_knobs: same high-selectivity x_pair family; gap/offset phase-anchor shift; keep projection matrix intact
run_groups.purpose: pull selected-channel phase toward 300 without sacrificing ratio/matrix

run_groups.seed_candidate: nearby 240/0 actual-phase donors from tracked B300/B240 families
run_groups.geometry_knobs: adjacent-bin donor relabel check; swap/no-swap; small gap changes
run_groups.purpose: find a better phase anchor if direct B300 pull remains offset

run_groups.geometry_knobs: diag_pair fallback; one wider gap and one swapped control
run_groups.purpose: minimal check that orientation/gap can move phase without killing selectivity
